title: COSTWAY Compact Laundry Dryer, 110V Electric Portable Clothes Dryer with Stainless Steel Tub, Control Panel Downside Easy Control for 4 Automatic Drying Mode, White

heating_failure: so stopped heating after 8 months. called Costway, they only have a 6 molnth warranty. Had bought a warranty with square trade and they will refund me the amount paid rather than send a tech out, and now its listed for more than I paid for it.  still tumbles, absolutely no heat

At first everything seemed fine but within 3 weeks the machine would not hear up. I called and requested a new machine. Instead they offered me $140 and suggested I call a repairman.
I called them back and explained this was not acceptable. That I would be charged to receive an estimate & would still be left with a lemon.
Waiting to hear back from them.
Will update.

I have had this item for about 8 months now. At first it worked great however about a month ago it stopped drying and now just tumbles the items. I loved it at first but for almost $400 lasting under a year is just unacceptable.
stopped_working: Ok bought this and broke after one year use , pretty disappointed, really -all that money gor one year ,

I ordered this on December 30th 2018 and it didn't even last a full year. I am ordering another one on December 27th 2019 . The reason I'm ordering another another one is because it ran really well, and dryed clothes really well for the less then a year we had it. When it stopped working the filter can kept falling off and then it just stopped working all together. Maybe I will get lucky this time

I loved this product when I got it!  LOVED it! HOWEVER…  it stopped working after only a month of use. It will turn on for 20 minutes then shut off. I have tried multiple times to contact the seller, so if they get back to me and fix it I will gladly give all the stars. Spend your money on a different brand.
motor_failure: Unfortunately I had this dryer for about 3 months and the belt broke. Also when I received it the belt was not on the drum and I had to follow a video to attach it as requested by the company. It wasnt a postive experience but it did work well for a few weeks. I just wish the belt issue could have been better tackled.

Dryer stopped spinning after 31 days. Just long enough for the return period to expire. Do they plan it this way? Drum turning kind of key to success of a dryer. Don't waste your money. Positive reviews (Real? Paid? Who knows?) up front when you're purchasing but read the others, which I suspect they suppress.

I’ve had this little dryer for a couple of weeks now and it has made my life so much easier. I live in a tiny one bedroom apartment and have next to no storage space. I was able to fit this on top of the shelving unit I have in my bathroom over my toilet. I used a couple of bungee cords to hold it in place just to be safe since it does cause the shelf to rattle a bit while it’s running.
noise_vibration: [[VIDEOID:f832854730f5e9fb96e3c311eba0e0d8]] I have had this washer for three days. I was impressed by the size, look, weight and ease of use. Sadly, mine went from sounding like fingers strumming on a table to loud rattling, as if it is tumble drying a bunch of hard metal objects. It sounds this way even when empty. I was depending on this machine and it let me down when I really needed it. Will

Was happy at first until a week shy of 2 months when it started making very loud scraping noises. Good thing I got insurance coverage but they only refunded my the price before taxes. I’m extremely disappointed. Never buying this brand again.

Was happy at first until a week shy of 2 months when it started making very loud scraping noises. Good thing I got insurance coverage but they only refunded my the price before taxes. I’m extremely disappointed. Never buying this brand again.
wont_power_on: Bought this in September 2019 and today dec 2019 it went out i had it exactly 3 months and it was awesome. Now not sure what happened today i did 1 load and on the second dry it just wouldn't go, did nothing. Tried plugging it else where an still nothing.
I recently got this product 3 months ago and the dryer no longer works. It has a burning smell coming out of it and doesn't start anymore.

Bought Sep 16, 2019, worked amazing but officially died.

I’ve looked at it to try to fix it but it’s a no go for some reason.
I just can’t figure out what is actually wrong with it.
The only thing I can think it could be is the actual power cord.

I’ll miss this little machine because it was so perfect, made it so I could do one load of laundry a day instead of 10 lo
physical_breakage: I was really happy with this dryer and gave it a 5 star. I edited my review because less then 3 months in the knob popped off. I have messaged the company and will edit my review depending on outcome.
dryer makes loud clicking noise and metal behind the lint trap snapped and the lint trap itself falls off consistently after 1 year of use.
control_failure:
It looks good out of the box, but quickly I learned the drying time, no matter how small the load, no matter how short the exhaust nozzle, no matter how clean the lint filter was (and I cleaned it every load), was about twice as long as the knob indicated.

And then worse happened, the knob stopped moving about 2 months in after 8 drying cycles (once a week laundry at 90 minutes a load).

[[VIDEOID:3a39247859ccd8ea428fe3e97444dadd]] I would like to say that this dryer worked good for maybe about 1 month only. After that It would turn off and on by itself (with or without  clothes in it) I contacted the seller and they were not much help. I expressed my concerns about it being a defective item. I don't believe it's fair to make the customer pay for the shipping cost to return the it
